---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in The Real Middle
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enter income value '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **Device**: (e.g., Desktop, Mobile - iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sonoma, Android 14, iOS 17)

## Income Range Tested

- **Income value entered**: (e.g., Rs. 50,000/month)
- **Category shown**: (e.g., urban, rural)
- **Percentile displayed**: (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If the issue is related to data accuracy, please also consider filing a [Data Issue](data_issue.md) instead.
